features: BENEFITS: Boar bristle hair brush made of 70% boar hair mix 30% nylon pins and beech wood handle easily penetrates through normal and thick hair, daily used helps to re-distribute oil from the scalp down the follicle to the ends of hair. Heal dry, brittle hair while removing excess oil, makes hair smooth and adds shine.

MINI HAIR BRUSH: Carefully selected bristles and handmade nylon ball tips ensure quality. The nylon balls are round and never fall off easily when handled with skill.Unique style designed and comfortable grip for children and travel, free to enjoy the process of combing hair, without pulling and crying.

BEST GIFTS: The boar bristle hair brushes is great for detangle, massage, smooth thick, thin, curly, long, short, wet or dry hair. The little bristle brush came in a beautiful gift box suitable as a gift for your kids and friends.
EASY TO USE: The ergonomic wooden paddle handle is easy to use and gives you all the benefits of boar bristle. Put it in your makeup bag and enjoy the benefits of a boar bristle brush when traveling.

QUALITY ASSURANCE, WORRY-FREE SHOPPING: We offer an unqualified full refund or replacement for 60 days with a 12-month assurance for quality. Our customer service is always at your service. Add to your cart now to enjoy your new boar bristle hairbrush.
description: Product Description Natural wooden Small Boar Bristle Paddle Hair Brush Mini hairbrush For Travel ,Pocket For Kids And Adults URTHEONE boar bristle hair brush is a unique combo hair brushes of naturel boar bristles and detangling nylon pins . It is easily penetrates through fine, normal, thick, coarse hair or beard that both detangles stubborn knots and massage your scalp . Wild bristles are recognized as the thinnest and straitest natural materials in the world. It is the most similar to human hair . The skin feels comfortable when fully touching the epidermis and spreads nourishing oils from scalp all along the length of your hair. Enjoy the wonderful parent-child time Daily hair care is essential, URTHEONE hair brush hope every customer can enjoy this wonderful time, can be full of children's laughter, can be light hair care, while hair more smooth and healthy. 70% Soft Boar Bristle Mixed 30% Stiffer Nylon Pin Unique compact shape, comfortable handle, easy to use.Suitable for Thick Fine Curly Straight Dry and Damaged Hair. For kids:Our boar bristle brush have the right size for a child's hand, helps them brush their own hair without screaming or crying,leaving their hair more healthier. For Women:Put in makeup bag, enjoy the benefit of bristle hair brush anytime and anywhere For travel: small size brush is the must-have brush during your trip. More Detalis Boar Bristles+Nylon Massage Pins Long-term use of URTHEONE boar bristle hairbrush makes your hair healthy and smoothy, is best for all hair types, especially those who is struggling with hair problems of hair lossing, frizz, split ends, scalp itching or greasy will benefit the most when use this boar bristle with nylon pins hairbrushes. Quality beech wood, comfortable handle Give You the 6 Benefits Brush Gently Through any Tangles Reduces Hair Breakage and Frizz Conditioning & Improve Hair Texture Repairs Dry Hair Cleans Hair and Increase Shine Stimulates and Massage Scalp Brand LOGO URTHEONE hair brush treasures every customer's experience.
